The '''Battle of Ithor''' was fought on the ''[[Tafanda Bay]]'' in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. [[Momaw Nadon/Legends|Momaw Nadon]] led an uprising against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison there, ending Imperial rule of [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]] for a short time.

{{Battle-stub}}
